nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brimeu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant, via Brimner, of the ethnic name Bremner , denoting someone from Brabant in the Low Countries.

variants.name: Bremner
meanings: Scottish: habitational name for someone from Brabant in the Low Countries, from Older Scots Brebner, Brabanare ‘native or inhabitant of Brabant’ (see Brabant and compare with the synonymous Brabazon ). Weavers from Brabant settled early at Aberdeen and on the east coast of Scotland.
German: habitational name for someone from the city of Bremen. This surname is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Brimeu was born in 1152, in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Radulf de Brimeu, was 29 and her mother, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, was 30. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with François DE THEROUANNE I. She died in 1209, in Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Brimeu est née en 1152, à Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Radulf de Brimeu, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec François DE THEROUANNE I. Elle est décédée en 1209, à Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Brimeu 1152 in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Radulf de Brimeu 29 und ihre Mutter Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu 30. Sie hatte mit François DE THEROUANNE I mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1209 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Brimeu è nata il nel 1152 nel Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Radulf de Brimeu, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con François DE THEROUANNE I. Morì nel 1209, nel Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Brimeuが1152年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブリメウックスで生まれた時，父Radulf de Brimeuは29歳，母Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieuは30歳であった。彼女はFrançois DE THEROUANNE Iとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1209年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイススeロウアンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Brimeu(이)가 1152년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 브라임우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Radulf de Brimeu(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 François DE THEROUANNE I(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1209년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 스e루앤에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Brimeu nasceu em 1152, em Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Radulf de Brimeu, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com François DE THEROUANNE I. Ela faleceu em 1209, em Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Brimeu родилась в 1152 г. в местности бримеукс, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Radulf de Brimeu было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, 30. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от François DE THEROUANNE I. Она умерла в 1209 г. в местности тeроуанн, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Brimeu nació en 1152, en Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Radulf de Brimeu, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con François DE THEROUANNE I. Murió en 1209, en Thérouanne, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
